input.content:
import { defineSchema, defineTable } from "convex/server";
import { v } from "convex/values";

export default defineSchema({
  // ── Auth (existing) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  users: defineTable({
    email: v.string(),
    name: v.string(),
    token: v.string(),
    createdAt: v.string(),
  }).index("by_token", ["token"]),

  // ── Execution state (Convex authoritative) ───────────────────────

  emails: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(), // SQLite id
    source: v.string(),
    direction: v.string(),
    threadId: v.string(),
    subject: v.optional(v.string()),
    fromEmail: v.string(),
    toEmails: v.string(), // JSON array
    ccEmails: v.optional(v.string()),
    date: v.string(),
    snippet: v.optional(v.string()),
    bodyPreview: v.optional(v.string()),
    labels: v.optional(v.string()),
    // Classification (SQLite authoritative, pushed up)
    class: v.optional(v.string()),
    classConfidence: v.optional(v.float64()),
    classifiedBy: v.optional(v.string()),
    // Unipile IDs
    unipileId: v.optional(v.string()),
    providerId: v.optional(v.string()),
    unipileAccountId: v.optional(v.string()),
    // Sync
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"])
    .index("by_thread", ["userId", "threadId"]),

  mailboxes: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    email: v.string(),
    provider: v.string(),
    transportEmail: v.optional(v.string()),
    rotationGroup: v.optional(v.string()),
    status: v.string(), // active | paused | auth_expired
    warmupStage: v.optional(v.string()),
    warmupStartedAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    firstTouchDailyCap: v.float64(),
    followUpDailyCap: v.float64(),
    replyDailyCap: v.float64(),
    minGapMinutes: v.float64(),
    sendWindowStartHour: v.float64(),
    sendWindowEndHour: v.float64(),
    sendWindowTimezone: v.string(),
    reputationScore: v.optional(v.float64()),
    priority: v.optional(v.float64()),
    lastUsedAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    lastBounceAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_email", ["userId", "email"]),

  mailboxSendEvents: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    mailboxId: v.string(), // externalId of mailbox
    sendType: v.string(), // first_touch | follow_up | reply
    sentAt: v.string(),
    taskId: v.optional(v.string()),
    enrollmentId: v.optional(v.string()),
    unipileMessageId: v.optional(v.string()),
    providerId: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_mailbox_day", ["mailboxId", "sentAt"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"]),

  sequenceEnrollments: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    sequenceName: v.string(),
    campaignName: v.optional(v.string()),
    mailboxId: v.string(),
    contactEmail: v.string(),
    contactName: v.optional(v.string()),
    subject: v.optional(v.string()),
    threadId: v.optional(v.string()),
    lastMessageId: v.optional(v.string()),
    status: v.string(), // active | paused | completed | stopped
    statusReason: v.optional(v.string()),
    replyState: v.optional(v.string()),
    currentStep: v.float64(),
    totalSteps: v.float64(),
    lastSentAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    lastReplyAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    nextDueAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    initialBody: v.optional(v.string()),
    // Unipile
    unipileThreadProviderId: v.optional(v.string()),
    unipileAccountId: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_status", ["userId", "status"])
    .index("by_contact", ["userId", "contactEmail"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"]),

  followUpTasks: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    enrollmentId: v.string(),
    mailboxId: v.string(),
    contactEmail: v.string(),
    subject: v.optional(v.string()),
    body: v.optional(v.string()),
    threadId: v.optional(v.string()),
    stepNumber: v.float64(),
    stepName: v.optional(v.string()),
    sendType: v.string(),
    status: v.string(), // open | completed | canceled
    sendStatus: v.string(), // pending | pending_remote_send | sent | failed | canceled
    dueAt: v.string(),
    completedAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    canceledReason: v.optional(v.string()),
    lastAttemptAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    lastError: v.optional(v.string()),
    attemptCount: v.float64(),
    // Unipile
    unipileMessageId: v.optional(v.string()),
    providerId: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_due", ["userId", "sendStatus", "dueAt"])
    .index("by_enrollment", ["enrollmentId"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"]),

  suppressions: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    scope: v.string(), // email | domain
    value: v.string(),
    reason: v.optional(v.string()),
    source: v.string(),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_lookup", ["userId", "scope", "value"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"]),

  replyEvents: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    enrollmentId: v.string(),
    mailboxId: v.optional(v.string()),
    threadId: v.string(),
    messageId: v.string(),
    contactEmail: v.string(),
    classification: v.string(),
    subject: v.optional(v.string()),
    snippet: v.optional(v.string()),
    occurredAt: v.string(),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_enrollment", ["enrollmentId"])
    .index("by_thread", ["userId", "threadId"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"]),

  sequenceDrafts: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    enrollmentId: v.string(),
    taskId: v.string(),
    stepNumber: v.float64(),
    subject: v.optional(v.string()),
    body: v.optional(v.string()),
    channel: v.string(), // email | linkedin
    status: v.string(), // pending | sent | canceled | stale
    generatedBy: v.optional(v.string()),
    generatedContext: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_task", ["taskId"])
    .index("by_enrollment", ["enrollmentId"])
    .index("by_sync_version", ["syncVersion"]),

  // ── Local state (SQLite authoritative, pushed up for dashboard) ──

  contacts: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    source: v.string(),
    sourceId: v.optional(v.string()),
    email: v.string(),
    name: v.optional(v.string()),
    domain: v.optional(v.string()),
    company: v.optional(v.string()),
    title: v.optional(v.string()),
    phone: v.optional(v.string()),
    leadStatus: v.optional(v.string()),
    owner: v.optional(v.string()),
    lastActivityAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    emailCount: v.optional(v.float64()),
    lastEmailedAt: v.optional(v.string()),
    class: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"])
    .index("by_email", ["userId", "email"]),

  learnings: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    type: v.string(),
    content: v.string(),
    sourceSession: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"]),

  skillVersions: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    skillName: v.string(),
    version: v.float64(),
    content: v.string(),
    emailCount: v.optional(v.float64()),
    learningCount: v.optional(v.float64()),
    active: v.optional(v.float64()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"]),

  deals: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    source: v.string(),
    sourceId: v.string(),
    name: v.string(),
    contactEmail: v.optional(v.string()),
    company: v.optional(v.string()),
    stage: v.optional(v.string()),
    status: v.optional(v.string()),
    value: v.optional(v.float64()),
    currency: v.optional(v.string()),
    closeDate: v.optional(v.string()),
    owner: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"]),

  // ── Convex-only tables ───────────────────────────────────────────

  unipileAccounts: defineTable({
    userId: v.string(),
    provider: v.string(), // GOOGLE | LINKEDIN
    unipileAccountId: v.string(),
    email: v.optional(v.string()),
    status: v.string(), // connected | disconnected | auth_expired
    connectedAt: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_provider", ["userId", "provider"])
    .index("by_unipile_id", ["unipileAccountId"]),

  syncState: defineTable({
    userId: v.string(),
    lastSyncVersion: v.float64(),
  }).index("by_user", ["userId"]),
});

    active: v.optional(v.float64()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"]),

  deals: defineTable({
    externalId: v.string(),
    source: v.string(),
    sourceId: v.string(),
    name: v.string(),
    contactEmail: v.optional(v.string()),
    company: v.optional(v.string()),
    stage: v.optional(v.string()),
    status: v.optional(v.string()),
    value: v.optional(v.float64()),
    currency: v.optional(v.string()),
    closeDate: v.optional(v.string()),
    owner: v.optional(v.string()),
    syncVersion: v.float64(),
    userId: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_external_id", ["externalId"]),

  // ── Convex-only tables ───────────────────────────────────────────

  unipileAccounts: defineTable({
    userId: v.string(),
    provider: v.string(), // GOOGLE | LINKEDIN
    unipileAccountId: v.string(),
    email: v.optional(v.string()),
    status: v.string(), // connected | disconnected | auth_expired
    connectedAt: v.string(),
  })
    .index("by_user", ["userId"])
    .index("by_provider", ["userId", "provider"])
    .index("by_unipile_id", ["unipileAccountId"]),

  syncState: defineTable({
    userId: v.string(),
    lastSyncVersion: v.float64(),
  }).index("by_user", ["userId"]),
});

content.text: This is a bundling conflict. Some files may have duplicate exports. Let me check `dispatcher.ts` — it has both top-level exports and inline `internalQuery`/`internalMutation` exports at the bottom. Convex might be confused by mixing `internalAction` export at top with `internalQuery` exports at bottom. Let me split the internal queries into a separate file:

The issue is that `dispatcher.ts` has duplicate import types — it imports `internalAction` at the top and then re-imports `internalQuery`, `internalMutation` at line ~113. In Convex, each file can only have one type of import pattern. Let me restructure — move the internal queries to a separate file.
The problem is the mid-file `import` statements. In Convex, all imports must be at the top. Let me rewrite the file with all imports at the top:

feat(P1): SQLite schema + sync engine + CLI pull/push commands

- New tables: mailbox_send_events (immutable send log), sequence_drafts
- Migration columns: unipile_id, provider_id, unipile_account_id on
  emails/tasks/enrollments; send_status on follow_up_tasks;
  sync_version on all 10 synced tables
- ConvexClient: PullExecutionState, PushLocalState, CreateSendIntent,
  Mutate, RequestConnectionLink endpoints
- Sync engine: pull execution state (Convex→SQLite), push local state
  (SQLite→Convex), batching, sync_version tracking
- CLI: nurge pull, nurge push commands
- 9 tests covering schema, Unipile fields, sync, upsert

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

Cron (every 5 min):

  not suppressed, send window, daily cap, min gap, draft not stale),
  sends via Unipile, records results

Webhook:
- unipileWebhook: verifies Unipile-Auth shared secret, processes
  new emails (stops ALL active enrollments for replying contact,
  cancels pending tasks/drafts, records reply event as
  needs_classification), handles account status (marks auth_expired)
- unipileAccountCallback: registers new Unipile account connections

content.text:
All phases built and committed. Here's the full summary:

## Built — All 5 Phases

### Phase 1: SQLite + Sync Engine (Go)
| File | What |
|------|------|
| `internal/db/db.go` | 2 new tables, 13 migration columns (Unipile IDs, send_status, sync_version) |
| `internal/account/sync.go` | ConvexClient sync endpoints (pull, push, send intent, mutate, connection link) |
| `internal/sync/sync.go` | Sync engine — pull execution state, push local state, batching, upsert |
| `internal/sync/sync_test.go` | 9 tests |
| `cmd/pull.go`, `cmd/push.go` | `nurge pull`, `nurge push` commands |

### Phase 2: Convex Schema + Unipile Auth
| File | What |
|------|------|
| `convex/schema.ts` | 16 tables mirroring SQLite + Convex-only tables |
| `convex/sync.ts` | `pullExecutionState`, `pushLocalState` |
| `convex/helpers.ts` | Auth, suppression check, daily cap count, send window |
| `convex/enrollments.ts` | Create, stop (status priority), pause, resume |
| `convex/unipile.ts` | `requestConnectionLink` (hosted auth), `backfillEmails` |
| `convex/http.ts` | HTTP routes for webhooks |

### Phase 3: Send Flow
| File | What |
|------|------|
| `convex/send.ts` | `sendViaUnipile`, `recordSendSuccess/Failure/AuthFailure` |

### Phase 4: Background Execution
| File | What |
|------|------|
| `convex/crons.ts` | 5-min cron calling `checkDueTasks` |
| `convex/dispatcher.ts` | Full dispatcher: find due tasks, validate, claim, send, handle failure |
| `convex/webhook.ts` | Reply detection, enrollment stopping, account status, Unipile-Auth verification |

### Phase 5: Cleanup
Code removal (Gmail client, local tokens, dispatcher --execute) — ready to do after deployment and testing of Phases 2-4.

**Next step:** You'll need to run `! npx convex dev` interactively to deploy the Convex functions to your existing project, and set the Unipile env vars (`UNIPILE_API_KEY`, `UNIPILE_API_URL`, `UNIPILE_WEBHOOK_SECRET`) in the Convex dashboard.
